# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /user
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /order
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - DELETE

upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    targets:
      - target: 192.168.1.100:80
        weight: 100
      - target: 192.168.1.101:80
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3

  - name: order-upstream
    targets:
      - target: 192.168.1.102:80
        weight: 100
      - target: 192.168.1.103:80
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
